net/balance

request for maintainer

adds STAGEDIR MAINTAINER
changes Makefile pkg-plist

This is a request for MAINTAINERship.
I have added STAGEDIR to this, and have made additional modifications
to ensure that this port meets current requirements. Please see
2014-09-03.diff, and net-balance-tests-out, for details.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
